positive: A minimalist, abstract representation of a celestial animal guide, such as a stylized constellation fox or lunar stag. The design must feature clean, thick silhouettes and flowing, continuous lines that suggest movement and magic. The scene uses a limited, harmonious color palette of deep midnight blue, glowing ethereal gold, and touches of pale lavender. The composition should be highly centralized and balanced, optimized for printing on a chest area. The style should be inspired by Art Deco geometry meeting delicate astronomical mapping, creating a sophisticated, highly visible print. Intricate line-work details within the solid shapes, strong contrast between the dark background and the glowing subject, studio lighting, perfect symmetry, print-ready resolution.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, words, out of frame, low detail, noise, messy lines, bad anatomy, multiple subjects, messy, busy, jpeg artifacts, signature
